title: Ripples of the Past: Bad Company Addon
description: A mod that adds Bad Company to Ripples of the Past mod
body:
![Bad Company banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bbc9e07c2115ff411c46e15aa06867553384151_0.webp)
A Minecraft mod that adds the non humanoid stand [Ripples of the Past Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/versions) obtainable through Stand Arrow

# Actions
![Put mines icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680b8b2d29199cc3f8a8bc4f1cc82e14be29d21e_0.webp) You order to your soldiers to put mines on their position, once you put them you can detonate them at will

![Forgive target icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/273bb404847cdf8bd06f5d4824f4c2687976597c_0.webp)You order to your units to forgive their target 

![Target Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bf118efe2351d63c571d3c1121ef053156e51ab.png) Order to your units to set a target

![Formation icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a69c0ac8e49d8b0da90849838636ad3e6a80f574.png) Choose the summon formation of your troops

![Unit type icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/060e4f6559939bb42f59f4ac5ba8461249fd310d.png) Select the unit type you want to command

![Stay close icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a33137d5fd9bfea313714bcc259090018cf588e3.png) Order to your units to stay close to you, it can be undone

![Wait icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a7db6e12f5caedc834d6666864d29ab58144a31_0.webp) Orderto your units to stay in place to shoot

![missile explode icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd6cca167a74009f839899f38b9391c49ca72013_0.webp) Change te destruction mode of your units missiles

![Go to Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d8ad9f21a83e97f1d8b17481740e067d6292619.png) Order to your units to go to a block
